Reduced Inequalities.reason: Compares "OECD租稅協定範本 vs. UN 範本" and covers fiscal policies like BEPS, directly relating to reducing inequality between countries (Targets 10.4, 10.6).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Directly addresses reducing illicit financial flows (Target 16.4) and building transparent institutions (Target 16.6) through "稅務資訊交換" and combating "租稅庇護所 (tax haven)".

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course is centered on international cooperation like "租稅協定" to strengthen domestic resource mobilization (Target 17.1) and enhance policy coherence (Target 17.14).
